title: Enhanced Dripstone Compats
description: Small collection of Enhanced Dripstone compats.
body:
This is a small collection of Xali's Enhaced Dripstone compats. It will be updated every once in a while, while also considering user requests. You are free to post some requests in the [issues tab](https://github.com/mxKeaton/Denis-Enhanced-Dripstone-Compats/issues)!

Credit goes to Xali and his original [Enhanced Dripstone](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/enhanced-dripstone/) resource pack.

### Currently adds compatibilities for:
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
- [Immersive Weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering)

### Suggested sorting order is:
![Sort Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f000dc5a6e6e35ebcbf730aac239d5e4da73892.png)
